name: Off-by-One Error
description: Loop or array index is off by one, causing missed or extra iteration
detection_hint: Check loop bounds carefully. Look for len()-1 or len()+1 patterns

name: Wrong Operator
description: Assignment used instead of comparison, or wrong arithmetic operator
detection_hint: Check all conditional statements for = vs == confusion

name: Missing None Check
description: Code accesses attribute or method of potentially None object
example_fixed: def get_name(user): return user.name if user else None
detection_hint: Check if None check exists before accessing object attributes

name: Integer Division Error
description: Integer division used where float division is needed
detection_hint: Check division operations for integer vs float type mismatch

name: SQL Injection Vulnerability
description: User input directly concatenated into SQL query without sanitization
example_buggy: query = 'SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = ' + user_id
detection_hint: Look for string concatenation in SQL queries with user input

name: Path Traversal Vulnerability
description: User-controlled input used in file path without validation
detection_hint: Check file operations that use user-supplied filenames

name: Race Condition
description: Shared resource accessed without proper locking in concurrent code
detection_hint: Look for shared variable modifications in threaded code without locks

name: Mutable Default Argument
description: Mutable object used as default function argument, shared across calls
example_fixed: def add_item(item, items=None): items = items or []
detection_hint: Check function signatures for mutable defaults like [], {}, set()

name: Wrong Comparison Type
description: Using == to compare with None/True/False instead of is/is not
detection_hint: Check comparisons with None, True, False — use is/is not

name: Insecure Random Number Generation
description: Using random module for security-sensitive operations
detection_hint: Check if random module is used for tokens, passwords, or security keys
